nasb.text: In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth when you see Abraham and Isaac and Jacob and all the prophets in the kingdom of God, but yourselves being thrown out.

esv.text: In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth, when you see Abraham and Isaac and Jacob and all the prophets in the kingdom of God but you yourselves cast out.

cnv.text: 當你們看見亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各和眾先知都在　神的國裡的時候，你們卻被趕到外面去，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。

ccb.text: “当你们看见亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各和众先知在上帝的国，自己却被丢在门外，必要在那里哀哭切齿。

csbs.text: 当你们看见亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各和所有的先知在神的国里，而你们却被丢在外面的时候，在那里将有哀哭和切齿。
